title: Master Evidence Synthesis: Final H1-H5 Scores, 50+-Row Evidence Table, Claim Mapping, and Reviewer Objection Matrix
summary: Demo notebook for the Master Evidence Synthesis evaluation of Circuit Motif Spectroscopy. Loads pre-computed synthesis data (hypothesis scores, evidence table, claim mapping, reviewer objections, limitations) from a curated 46KB mini dataset. Displays H1-H5 hypothesis verdicts with confidence scores, a master evidence table mapping sub-claims to metrics, paper claim mappings by section, reviewer objection-response matrix, and limitations. Includes a 3-panel dashboard visualization showing hypothesis confidence bars, key aggregate metrics, and objection severity distribution.
